content_items.title: High-throughput Wheat Leaf DNA Extraction in 96-well Plates
content_items.short_description: Optimized wheat leaf tissue DNA extraction protocol for 96-well plate format, suitable for high-throughput genotyping labs.
content_items.body:
High-throughput Wheat Leaf DNA Extraction (96-well)

This protocol describes a CTAB-based DNA extraction from young wheat leaf tissue using a 96-well plate format compatible with downstream SNP genotyping and sequencing workflows.

content_items.title: Maize Leaf DNA Extraction in 384-well Plates
content_items.short_description: High-density maize leaf DNA extraction workflow formatted for 384-well plates and robotics.
content_items.body:
Maize Leaf DNA Extraction (384-well)

This protocol supports ultra-high-throughput DNA extraction for maize breeding pipelines using 384-well plates and automated liquid handling.

content_items.title: Wheat Targeted Sequencing Library Preparation
content_items.short_description: Step-by-step protocol for preparing wheat targeted sequencing libraries from plate-based DNA extractions.
content_items.body:
Wheat Targeted Sequencing Library Prep

This protocol details multiplex PCR-based enrichment and library preparation for targeted sequencing panels in wheat.

content_items.title: Simple Sorghum Seed DNA Extraction for Marker-Assisted Selection
content_items.short_description: Low-cost sorghum seed DNA extraction protocol for small breeding labs.
content_items.body:
Sorghum Seed DNA Extraction

This protocol uses a simplified alkaline lysis method for sorghum seed DNA extraction suitable for MAS genotyping.

content_items.title: Chickpea Leaf DNA Extraction in 96-well Plates
content_items.short_description: High-throughput DNA extraction protocol for chickpea leaf tissue using 96-well plates.
content_items.body:
Chickpea 96-well Leaf DNA Extraction

Designed for custom SNP assay pipelines in chickpea, this protocol supports up to 10 plates per day per technician.

content_items.title: Comparing Marker-Assisted Selection and Genomic Selection in Cereals
content_items.short_description: A practical guide to choosing between MAS and GS in wheat, maize, and rice breeding programs.
content_items.body:
MAS vs GS: Which Strategy Fits Your Program?

This article compares the cost, complexity, and ROI of MAS and GS in cereal breeding.

content_items.title: How to Use the MAS ROI Calculator
content_items.short_description: Step-by-step walkthrough of the 5-year marker-assisted selection ROI calculator.
content_items.body: In this 15-minute video, we explain how to configure Scenario 1 and Scenario 2, interpret the ROI outputs, and save preferred scenarios.

content_items.title: Genomic Selection Delivers 18% Maize Yield Gain in Western Kenya
content_items.short_description: A public-private maize breeding partnership in Kenya achieved an 18% yield increase using genomic selection and high-density SNP panels.
content_items.body:
18% Yield Gain in Kenyan Maize Using Genomic Selection

This case study describes how integrating genomic selection and rapid-cycle breeding led to substantial yield improvements for smallholder farmers in Western Kenya.

content_items.title: Marker-Assisted Selection Boosts Maize Yields by 12% in Northern Nigeria
content_items.short_description: Deployment of MAS for drought tolerance and Striga resistance led to 12% higher yields across farmer field trials in Northern Nigeria.
content_items.body:
MAS in Nigerian Maize Breeding

This study documents the design, implementation, and impact of MAS-based product development for drought and Striga resistance.

content_items.title: Drought-Tolerant Maize Hybrids Deliver 25% Yield Increase in Eastern Ethiopia
content_items.short_description: Integration of genomic prediction for drought tolerance resulted in up to 25% higher maize yields in on-farm trials in Eastern Ethiopia.
content_items.body:
Drought-Tolerant Maize in Ethiopia

We outline the breeding strategy, trial design, and farmer adoption patterns for drought-tolerant maize hybrids.

content_items.title: Genomic Selection Achieves 9% Wheat Yield Gain in Eastern India
content_items.short_description: A regional wheat breeding program in India reports a 9% average yield increase after three cycles of genomic selection.
content_items.body:
GS in Indian Wheat Breeding

This case study shares lessons learned from implementing genomic selection in resource-constrained environments.

content_items.title: Marker-Assisted Pyramiding of Blast Resistance in Rice in Southeast Asia
content_items.short_description: Case study on deploying MAS to develop rice varieties with durable blast resistance across Southeast Asia.
content_items.body:
Rice Blast Resistance via MAS

We describe the marker sets, selection scheme, and performance in multilocation trials.

content_items.title: Quality Control Checklist for Wheat DNA Prior to Genotyping
content_items.short_description: Checklist of DNA quality metrics and troubleshooting tips before submitting wheat DNA for SNP genotyping or sequencing.
content_items.body:
Wheat DNA QC Checklist

Learn which metrics matter most for reliable SNP calls, including purity ratios, fragment size, and concentration thresholds.

content_items.title: Setting Up Multi-location Sorghum Breeding Projects
content_items.short_description: Guidelines for defining traits, seasons, and locations when creating new sorghum breeding projects.
content_items.body:
Designing Sorghum Breeding Projects

This guide walks through naming conventions, trait selection, and location management for sorghum drought trials.

genotyping_panels.description: Ultra-dense 70K maize SNP panel for advanced genomic prediction and fine-mapping studies.

genotyping_panels.name: Barley QC Panel 8K
genotyping_panels.description: Low-density SNP panel for routine barley line purity and identity checks.

genotyping_panels.name: Soybean Americas Diversity Panel 50K
genotyping_panels.description: High-density soybean SNP panel tailored for breeding programs in the Americas.

sequencing_services.name: Rice Targeted Sequencing 96-plex

sequencing_services.name: Sorghum RNA-seq 50M Reads per Sample

sequencing_services.name: Chickpea Exome Sequencing 80x
sequencing_services.description: Exome capture sequencing for chickpea gene discovery and variant analysis.

sequencing_services.name: Multi-crop Custom Targeted Sequencing 192-plex
sequencing_services.description: Flexible targeted sequencing service for minor cereals and legumes with custom amplicon design.

sequencing_services.name: Wheat Targeted Sequencing 48-plex Express
sequencing_services.description: Small-batch wheat targeted sequencing with ultra-fast 14-day turnaround for pilot studies.

software_modules.name: Field Trial Management
software_modules.description: Design, randomize, and manage multi-location field trials with mobile data capture.

software_modules.name: Genomic Selection
software_modules.description: Configure training populations, run genomic prediction models, and select candidates.

software_modules.name: Data Management
software_modules.description: Centralized storage and curation of genotypic, phenotypic, and environmental data.

software_modules.name: Analytics & Reporting
software_modules.description: Interactive dashboards, heritability estimates, GxE analysis, and ROI summaries.

software_products.name: Breeding Management Suite
software_products.description: Integrated breeding data platform covering field trial management, genomic selection, and analytics for multi-crop programs.

software_products.name: Field Trial Manager
software_products.description: Lightweight SaaS for designing trials, collecting data in the field, and exporting to analysis tools.

software_products.name: Genomics Analytics Light
software_products.description: Entry-level analytics environment for small teams focusing on genomic prediction and marker effects.

training_courses.title: Genomic Selection in Rice Breeding: Foundations
training_courses.description: Intermediate-level course covering the basics of genomic selection model building and deployment in rice.
training_courses.syllabus: Day 1: GS concepts and data requirements; Day 2: Model building and selection decisions.
training_courses.prerequisites: Basic understanding of quantitative genetics and mixed models.

training_courses.title: Advanced Genomic Selection Models for Rice
training_courses.description: Deep dive into multi-trait, multi-environment, and Bayesian genomic prediction models in rice breeding.
training_courses.syllabus: GS model extensions, cross-validation strategies, and practical implementation exercises.
training_courses.prerequisites: Completion of Genomic Selection in Rice Breeding: Foundations or equivalent experience.

training_courses.title: Applied Genomic Selection Workflows for Rice Programs
training_courses.description: Hands-on workshop on integrating GS into routine rice breeding pipelines, including data flow and decision support.
training_courses.syllabus: Case studies, software demos, and exercise-based project planning.
training_courses.prerequisites: Familiarity with basic GS concepts and breeding program operations.

training_courses.title: Marker-Assisted Selection and QTL Mapping in Rice
training_courses.description: Training on QTL detection and deployment of MAS for key traits in rice.
training_courses.syllabus: Linkage mapping, QTL detection, and MAS pipeline design.

training_courses.title: Introduction to Genomic Selection in Maize
training_courses.description: Beginner-level overview of genomic selection concepts applied to maize breeding.
training_courses.syllabus: Core GS concepts, examples from maize breeding programs.

training_courses.title: Field Trial Design for Multi-location Cereal Trials
training_courses.description: Designing robust multi-location trials for wheat, maize, rice, and sorghum.
training_courses.syllabus: Alpha-lattice designs, spatial analysis, and layout in field trial software.

training_courses.title: Breeding Data Management Essentials
training_courses.description: Organizing, cleaning, and archiving breeding data for genomic-era programs.
training_courses.syllabus: Data templates, metadata standards, and basic ETL pipelines.

training_courses.title: Calculating ROI for MAS and GS Investments
training_courses.description: Workshop on using ROI calculators to prioritize investments in molecular breeding.
training_courses.syllabus: Cost modeling, expected gain estimation, and sensitivity analysis.
training_courses.prerequisites: Experience with breeding program budgeting and basic economics.

training_courses.title: Custom SNP Assay Design for Legume Crops
training_courses.description: Design considerations for custom SNP assays in chickpea and other legumes.
training_courses.syllabus: Target selection, design constraints, and vendor communication.
training_courses.prerequisites: Basic genotyping and sequence analysis knowledge.

training_courses.title: Sorghum Drought Tolerance Breeding Strategies
training_courses.description: Advanced course on phenotyping and selection strategies for drought tolerance in sorghum.
training_courses.syllabus: Trait dissection, managed stress environments, and genomic approaches.
training_courses.prerequisites: Experience with sorghum breeding and field trial management.

traits.name: Drought tolerance
traits.description: Ability of a plant to maintain performance under limited water availability.

traits.name: Grain yield
traits.description: Harvestable grain mass per unit area, typically expressed in t/ha.

traits.name: Disease resistance
traits.description: Reduced disease severity or incidence caused by specific pathogens.

traits.name: Plant height
traits.description: Height of the plant from the ground to the tip of the main panicle or tassel.

traits.name: Striga resistance
traits.description: Host plant resistance to Striga parasitic weed infestation.
